title: Compact Nourishment
subtitle: Maximizing nutrition in small portions
description: At this stage, you may feel full more quickly and have less capacity for large meals. Focusing on small, nutrient-dense portions and staying well hydrated can help you meet your body’s needs comfortably.
what_to_expect: Feeling full more quickly than before
Continued fatigue or low energy moments
nutrition_focus: Maintain consistent hydration throughout the day
recommended_foods: Small balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, and soft sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, curd, fruit bowls, or smoothies
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals due to low appetite
hydration: Drink water in small, frequent sips
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Even small, nutrient-rich meals can effectively support your body’s needs.

diabetes.personalized_description: Smaller, frequent meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent, balanced meals support steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Nutrient-dense, iron-rich foods in small portions support energy and strength.
nutrition_focus: Include iron-rich foods in small portions
Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Small, consistent intake supports your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced small meals and hydration support stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and steady routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Small, consistent meals support metabolic balance and steady energy.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on small, frequent, and nutrient-dense meals helps maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
